vibe: Modern, youthful, premium, adventure-oriented. Avoids 'fintech-bro' or AI-slop. Uses rich natural colors, generous breathing room, and immersive storytelling layouts.

typography.alignment_rules: Left-align paragraphs and dense content. Headings can be centered if balancing a symmetrical hero or section, otherwise default to left alignment for an editorial feel.

layout_and_spacing.optical_alignment: Apply generous internal padding to bordered containers to prevent text collisions.

components.navigation: Sticky top, Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80). Dark text. 1px bottom border border-[#121A10]/5. Logo on left, links in center, primary CTA on right.
components.hero: Full-bleed hero section (minimum 90vh). High-quality video or image background with an elegant gradient overlay (e.g., bg-black/40). Large left-aligned heading, animated on entry.
components.trust_badges: A sleek row immediately following the hero. Solid background #F2ECE1 with rounded edges, 4 columns for desktop (24x7 Support, 100% Personalised, 4.9★ Rated, 10k+ Happy Travelers).
components.destination_cards: Cardless or subtle 1px border (#E3DCCB) with no drop shadow initially. rounded-2xl. Image covers top 50-60%. Pill-shaped 'Save ₹X' badge in secondary color positioned overlapping the image. Clean text hierarchy with strikethrough original prices. 'Details' button as full-width primary button at the bottom.
components.google_reviews: Horizontal scroll / marquee or a swiper carousel. Clean cards with 5-star icons in accent_yellow, user name, and concise text.
components.faq_accordion: Minimalist Shadcn accordion. No heavy borders; use 1px bottom borders for each item. Smooth expansion.
components.lead_capture_popup: Glassmorphism overlay. Form container in solid #FDFBF7. Inputs use Shadcn with custom focus rings (ring-primary). Fields: Name, Mobile, Place, Month.
components.footer: Dark layout (#121A10). Generous padding (py-24). Multi-column grid. Large 'Let\'s Talk' heading. Include 'Designed by Viquat AI'. Buttons for WhatsApp/Instagram.

animations.general: Smooth, tactile, and non-distracting. Use framer-motion.
animations.scroll: Fade-up and subtle Y translation on scroll for section headers and cards.
animations.hover_effects: Image zoom on cards (scale 1.05) with overflow-hidden. Buttons lift up (-translate-y-1) and gain subtle shadow.
animations.navigation: Nav bar border/shadow appears when scrolled past hero.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements, buttons, links, and forms MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta', data-testid='popup-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts (@fontsource/cabinet-grotesk, @fontsource/manrope) or import via CSS.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or lucide-react for UI icons.

Use pure HTML + Tailwind for creative marketing layouts; use Shadcn strictly for interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Accordions, Dialogs) but heavily customize their classes to remove the 'default Vercel' look.
Implement the Lead Capture Popup to trigger after 15 seconds or 50% scroll.
Ensure strict contrast accessibility, especially text overlaid on the hero image/video.
Follow the bento grid patterns for categories and 'Why travel with us' storytelling sections.
